title: Oneironaut
description: An addon for Hex Casting centered around exploration and use of the Noosphere
body:
Oneironaut: One who explores dream worlds ([See link for pronounciation](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/oneironaut))

Have you ever despaired at the fact that Hex Casting has essentially no dimension-related features? Well, here you go!

This addon adds several things, such as:
- A spell to teleport yourself and other entities between dimensions
   - Doesn't work on other players, so you can't just yeet someone into the end void.
- A spell to teleport structures between dimensions
   - Domain Expansion, anyone?
- A couple of actions that give you dimension iotas, which are necessary to use the aforementioned dimensional spells
- A spell that transmutes various blocks into other blocks, including a gateway to a new dimension
- Wisp Lanterns, a decorative light-emitting block that you can give one of base Hex's pigments in order to have it mimic it. There's also a tinted version that doesn't emit light.
- The Reverberation Rod, a casting item that casts its hex every tick while you hold rclick on it. It comes with a suite of patterns designed to interact with its special features.
- The Noosphere, the aforementioned new dimension. Contains a couple of structures where you can obtain unique items.
- A weapon enchantment that deals a small amount of unblockable damage
- Blocks that are resistant to hexes
